ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "def" INTEGER /* Defense value of the item */,
  "mdf" INTEGER /* Magic Defense value of the item */,
  "bonus_stats" TEXT /* Bonus stats granted by the item (e.g., +3 AGI) */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for equipping the item (e.g., Thin Wing x2) */,
  "buy_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the item can be bought */,
  "sell_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the item can be sold */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the item */,
  "is_equippable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item can be equipped */,
  "slot" TEXT /* Slot where the item can be equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that has this requirement */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement (e.g., Thin Wing) */,
  "requirement_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the requirement needed */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., Item, Level, Skill) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_requirements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_bonus_stats" (
  "bonus_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus stat */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that grants this bonus stat */,
  "bonus_stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the bonus stat (e.g., AGI) */,
  "bonus_stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the bonus stat */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of stat (e.g., Base, Bonus, Conditional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_bonus_stats_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "agi" INTEGER /* Agility of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the character */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Amount of gold the character possesses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_items" (
  "character_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-item pair */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "equip_date" TEXT /* Date the item was equipped */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is currently equipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_items_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items bought or sold */,
  "total_price" INTEGER /* Total price of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the inventory */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_inventories_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_inventories_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the item */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Type of currency (e.g., Gold, Diamonds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_prices_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
